citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:30 PM on
2/12/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals,
and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and
may result in enforcement action.
Additional Inspectors:
Patricia Laracuente, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICEREnd Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:30 PM on 
2/12/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, 
and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and 
may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
Patricia Laracuente, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICEREnd Section
